daily_summary.headline: Falcon Heavy and Atlas V Lead the Day

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3
top_events.description: Launch of Falcon Heavy carrying ViaSat-3 F3, a major communications satellite for the Asia-Pacific region.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for spectacular booster landings.

top_events.title: Atlas V 551 | Amazon Leo (LA-06)
top_events.description: Launch of Atlas V 551 carrying Amazon Leo satellites for global broadband internet.
top_events.action: Follow live updates for this significant satellite deployment.

top_events.title: Soyuz 2.1b | 16 x Rassvet-3
top_events.description: Launch of Soyuz 2.1b with 16 Rassvet-3 satellites for Russian broadband internet.
top_events.action: Monitor for updates on this Russian communications mission.
